title: Aliens landed in New York
text: Extraterrestrial beings have finally made contact! Yesterday evening, a massive UFO was seen hovering over Times Square. Government officials are completely silent on the matter, but eyewitnesses report seeing little green men walking out.

title: Miracle cure for all diseases found
text: A secret laboratory has discovered a single pill that cures every known illness, from the common cold to cancer. Big pharma is trying to hide this from you, but we have the exclusive truth. Buy our supplement now to be immune forever!
